title: Core path, optional depth
summary: A two-dimensional deck keeps the main talk horizontal and places optional detail below the slide that needs it.
note: Use right/left for the core path. Use down/up when a detour is available.

cards.title: Horizontal
cards.body: The audience can follow slides 1-4 without missing required context.

cards.title: Vertical
cards.body: Detours sit beneath a core slide as presenter backup or optional depth.

cards.title: Explicit
cards.body: Deck navigation declares the core path and detour stacks in state.
